bugs.title: Phase 3 acceptance criteria 5-11 not green: 8 gametests fail despite build/test matrix passing
bugs.evidence: criterion 5,6: tooltip gametests fail (ItemTooltipCallback client-only). criterion 7-11: combat gametests fail (mock-player attack-strength).
bugs.expected: All 14 Phase 3 acceptance criteria from the source plan are checked and documented as passing.
bugs.suggested_fix: Cycle 3 must address the two root causes flagged in wave-4-agent-1-bug-2 and wave-4-agent-1-bug-3. Once 9 gametests pass, criteria 5-11 will flip to PASS and the phase-3-combat-hooks tag (criterion 14) can be safely placed.

bugs.title: en_us.json key audit (criterion 13) not executed by static verifier
bugs.evidence: verifier did not run the for-loop grep specified in plan lines 1975-1980.
bugs.suggested_fix: Add the grep audit to cycle 3 wave-5 (or fold into wave-6 cleanup).
